emails.subject: RE: Plan Assumptions with Stan, 2/6/02, 8:00 am
emails.body: This is new to me! Teb, Rob is out on Wed. right? You might want to call him on the cell.

emails.subject: RE: Plan Assumptions with Stan, 2/6/02, 8:00 am
emails.body: Rob is out and I don't know if he isavailable on the cell. He is with Alexander in Florida. I think we need to meet this pm.

emails.subject: RE: Plan Assumptions with Stan, 2/6/02, 8:00 am
emails.body: Teb; Horton is having a floor meeting at 2:00...............Does he know Rob is out? Stan usually likes a "big" crowd when he beats us up!

emails.subject: RE: Plan Assumptions with Stan, 2/6/02, 8:00 am
emails.body: I've been out since last Tuesday and don't know any more than I see in the e-mails. Can we meet before of after the floor meeting?
